description_long: This object is a rectangular medicine box labeled 'Rivotril Clonazepam 0.5 mg', featuring a bold black, white, and yellow color scheme. The front face displays the brand name in large black letters, with the active ingredient and dosage in blue and smaller text. Below, a yellow band highlights 'Medicamento Generico' and a large 'G' symbol, indicating it is a generic medication. The lower section contains additional information in white text on a black background, including 'Venda sob prescrição médica'. The box is flat and thin, suggesting it is likely an empty or display package rather than a full, three-dimensional container. The sides are plain and show the minimal thickness of the object.
description: A flat, rectangular medicine box labeled 'Rivotril Clonazepam 0.5 mg' with a black, white, and yellow design and generic medication markings.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full label with all text and color bands clearly visible.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the extreme thinness of the object, with no visible label or detail.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a mirrored version of the front label, indicating the object is a flat print or card.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the object's thin profile, with no label or detail.
attribute_label_text: Rivotril Clonazepam 0.5 mg G Medicamento Generico Venda sob prescrição médica
